mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEDIA WHERE FILE_SN = #{fileSn} AND UUID = #{uuid} AND USEYN = 'Y') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FILE_READER_WRITE WHERE FILE_SN = #{fileSn} AND UUID = #{uuid} AND USEYN = 'Y') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FILE_OPENER_LIST WHERE FILE_SN = #{fileSn} AND UUID = #{uuid} AND USE_YN = 'Y')

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEDIA WHERE FILE_SN = #{fileSn} AND USEYN = 'Y') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FILE_READER_WRITE WHERE FILE_SN = #{fileSn} AND USEYN = 'Y') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FILE_OPENER_LIST WHERE FILE_SN = #{fileSn} AND USE_YN = 'Y')
